headline: Oil prices surge, Fed rate hike odds increase
detail: Brent crude topping $100 is a major headwind for growth stocks, as it increases the odds of a Fed rate hike. This directly impacts your concentrated tech and chip holdings.
rec: Consider trimming SOXL and other leveraged tech ETFs given the increased macro risk.

headline: Tesla, Alphabet fall on AI spending concerns
detail: Major tech names are showing weakness due to concerns over AI spending. This sentiment can spill over into other tech and chip companies you hold.
rec: No action needed on holdings based solely on this, but monitor your tech exposure.

headline: American Airlines stock tumbles on fuel spike
detail: Rising fuel costs are impacting airline stocks, demonstrating how commodity price increases can hurt specific sectors. While not directly your sector, it highlights the broader inflationary pressure.
rec: This headline does not directly warrant action on your current holdings.
